CREATE TABLE timestamps (event_time DateTime64(9)) ENGINE = Memory;
WITH toDateTime64('2020-01-01 10:20:30.000000001', 9) AS dt64 SELECT toStartOfMillisecond(dt64) AS rounded_dt;
CREATE TABLE events (event_id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(9)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT event_id, toStartOfMillisecond(event_time) AS rounded_time FROM events;
WITH (SELECT toDateTime64('2020-01-01 10:20:30.000000500', 9)) AS subquery SELECT toStartOfMillisecond(subquery) AS rounded_subquery_time;
SELECT a.event_id, b.event_time, toStartOfMillisecond(b.event_time) AS rounded_time FROM events AS a INNER JOIN timestamps AS b ON a.event_id = 1;
CREATE TABLE timezone_test (tz String, event_time DateTime64(9)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT tz, toStartOfMillisecond(event_time, tz) AS rounded_time FROM timezone_test;
CREATE TABLE datetimes (time_val DateTime64(9)) ENGINE = Memory;
WITH (SELECT AVG(time_val) FROM datetimes) AS avg_time SELECT toStartOfMillisecond(avg_time) AS rounded_avg_time;
